name: Fahd

conquest.name: Sandstorm
conquest.description: Reduces all enemy squads' Attack for 2 seconds.

conquest.name: Eagle Wings
conquest.description: Activates after Sandstorm. Increases his and nearby friendly squads' Attack for 2 seconds.

expedition.name: Desert Eclipse
expedition.description: Reduces all enemy squads' damage dealt.

exclusive_gear_note: Epic heroes do not have exclusive gear.

Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.

lore_background.title: The Desert Warrior with the Eagle Companion
lore_background.backstory: Fahd is a desert warrior and skilled cavalry commander who fights alongside an eagle — coordinating tactical maneuvers through coded signals with his bird companion. He values honor over wealth and is known for telling captivating stories to children of the villages he passes through. His battlefield precision is matched by his devotion to a principled life outside combat.

deep_analysis: Fahd is the lowest-priority Epic hero on the Kingshot roster — a Gen 1 Epic Cavalry whose kit has a unique Sandstorm + Eagle Wings sequence (apply Sandstorm debuff first, then Eagle Wings activates for a +35% Attack buff to himself and nearby allies for 2 seconds). Dune General adds +30% self Attack Speed, Desert Eclipse reduces enemy damage dealt by 20%, and Pathfinder uniquely boosts Solo Hunting March Speed by up to +100%. No exclusive gear (Epic pattern). heroes.js flags him as 'very low priority — only use if you have absolutely no other joiner options.' His mechanical value is outweighed by almost every other Epic hero. His lore, however, is one of the most evocative in the Epic pool: a desert warrior whose true partner is an eagle he commands through coded signals, a man who values honor over wealth and tells captivating stories to children. He's the hero you don't invest in, but whose story you remember.
unverified_fields: skill_priority, gear_build, named_pairs, counters, shard_cost — all null

handbook_meta.description: Fahd provides unique OppDamageDown (effect_op 201) that directly reduces enemy damage output. Unlike DefenseUp, this debuffs the ENEMY, making Fahd essential against whale attackers. Pair with Eric (202) for 1.44x OppDamageDown multiplier.

effect_op_codes.description: OppDamageDown 201 — unique debuffer, pairs with Eric for 1.44x
